issues.title: Implicit Concurrency Dependency
issues.why: The spec relies on SQLite WAL and specific busy_timeouts for local CLI concurrency but links to an external module (spec/13) rather than defining the local lock-file pathing here.
issues.fix: Explicitly define the 'update.lock' file path in the 02-release-pipeline.md concurrency section.

issues.title: Partial Failure Cleanup
issues.why: The Bash trap for cleanup is defined but the PowerShell equivalent for cleaning up $TMP_DIR on failure (Try/Finally) is less explicit in the snippet.
issues.fix: Add a Try/Finally block to the PowerShell installer snippet in 03-install-scripts.md to ensure temp directory removal.

issues.title: Ambiguous 'sh' vs 'bash' in curl pipe
issues.why: AC-18 mentions Bash 4+ but 03-install-scripts.md uses a self-re-exec guard for 'sh' which might be 'dash' on some systems, potentially causing syntax errors before the guard executes.
issues.fix: Ensure the first 10 lines of install.sh use only POSIX-compliant syntax before the Bash re-exec guard.
